articles.title: Orban concedes 'painful' defeat to conservative Magyar in Hungary polls
articles.content: "We have not been entrusted with the responsibility and opportunity to govern. I congratulated the winning party," he said. Magyar, 45, a political newcomer and former government insider, posed on social media that Orban "just called to...

articles.title: Delays mar vote as crisis-hit Peru picks ninth president in decade
articles.content: Conservative candidates have dominated pre-election polls, raising the prospect Peru could join the growing tide of hard-right leaders in Latin America. "I want people to vote for an honest president," said shopkeeper Anita Medrano, 60. "Not the old or traditional ones. They already had their chance."

articles.title: Is it a Good Deal?: Leedon Residence unit sold for record $5.2 mil profit
articles.content: This is also the highest recorded profit for resale transactions at Leedon Residence to date. This translates to an annualised gross return of about 5.3%, based on price appreciation alone. Read also: Is it a Good Deal?: A five-room flat along Jalan Membina was just sold for $1.1 million. Leedon Residence is a freehold condominium located along Leedon Heights in District 10, within the Bukit Timah Planning Area.
